struct Connection {
    is_connected: bool,
    is_authenticated: bool,
    is_encrypted: bool,
    is_compressed: bool,
}

impl Connection {
    fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            is_connected: false,
            is_authenticated: false,
            is_encrypted: false,
            is_compressed: false,
        }
    }

    fn connect(&mut self) {
        self.is_connected = true;
    }

    fn authenticate(&mut self) {
        if !self.is_connected {
            return;
        }
        self.is_authenticated = true;
    }

    fn enable_encryption(&mut self) {
        if !self.is_connected {
            return;
        }
        self.is_encrypted = true;
    }

    fn enable_compression(&mut self) {
        if !self.is_connected {
            return;
        }
        self.is_compressed = true;
    }

    fn status(&self) -> String {
        format!(
            "connected={} auth={} encrypted={} compressed={}",
            self.is_connected, self.is_authenticated, self.is_encrypted, self.is_compressed
        )
    }
}
